idea-plugin.name: Newdot file Explorer
idea-plugin.description:
Overview

Newdot adds a netrw-style file explorer directly inside the editor for IdeaVim users. It keeps navigation in editor splits/tabs instead of jumping to the Project tool window.

Core Commands

  • :new . open explorer in a split
  • :e . replace current view with explorer
  • :tabe . open explorer in a new tab
  • Works with other folders too, for example :new ~

Explorer Keys

  • <Enter> / o: open item
  • t: open file in new tab
  • s: open file in horizontal split
  • -: parent directory, ~: home, p: project root
  • N/T/M/S: sort by name/type/mtime/size
  • y: yank full path

Bookmarks

  • :sb or :wb: save bookmark
  • :lb: open bookmark by name
  • :db: delete bookmark
  • :lsb or :bookmarks: show all bookmarks
